_comment: Species: Ji Qiong (季穷) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ji Qiong

canonical.appearance: Ancient god-tier beast 100 m, form shifts between beast and god-fragment, body crackles with ancient god-power
canonical.size: 100 m adult, planetary mass; true form spans regions
canonical.behavior: Ancient god-tier beast; cultivated from ancient god-fragments; Wang Lin obtained its head as treasure
canonical.habitat: Ancient god ruins, god-aspected forbidden zones
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained Ji Qiong's head as treasure (canon event)
canonical.bloodline: Ancient God lineage; born from god-fragments
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ji_qiong — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
